DATASET_LOAD_STARTED.message: Started loading dataset {dataset_name} from {dataset_path} for start_date: {start_date}, end_date: {end_date}

DATASET_LOAD_COMPLETED.message: Dataset {dataset_name} loaded successfully from {dataset_path} with {row_count} rows

DATASET_WRITE_COMPLETED.message: Output to datasink {dataset_name} written successfully at {output_path} with {row_count} rows

QUERY_SEGMENT_EXECUTION_STARTED.message: Started executing query segment in step {step_number}

QUERY_SEGMENT_EXECUTION_COMPLETED.message: Query segment in step {step_number} completed with {row_count} rows

QUERY_SEGMENT_EXECUTION_FAILED.message: Query segment in step {step_number} failed with error: {error}

QUERY_EXECUTION_COMPLETED.message: Query execution completed successfully in {duration_sec} seconds
